response.original_title: Emil & Karl – Little Wheels, Big Mountains
response.overview: Jakob and Konne, two adventurous fathers bring their two year old sons, on a six-day mountain bike tour through the Swiss Alps. From rumbling stomachs and croissant crises to unavoidable tantrums – what begins as an ideal plan quickly turns into a test of patience for all four.
response.title: Emil & Karl – Little Wheels, Big Mountains

results.name: Emil & Karl - Kleine Reifen – Große Berge | Film trailer – BANFF TOUR 2026
